USA.label: Imperial (US)
USA.codeWall: CWA 2009 — General Specification for the Design and Engineering of ACS
USA.codeBoulder: CWA 2009 — General Specification for the Design and Engineering of ACS

notes: All load values are characteristic values and MUST be factored per the acting national standard.
Dead load acts on the whole building. Live load does NOT act simultaneously on every frame — each frame is regarded individually.
For any point the maximal load is taken for a single level of attachment at a time; other levels take their concurrent values.
R values = load on one axis of the ACS (base points / single-axis attachment). L values = load on the building columns (span-adjusted).
The manual for use is an inseparable part of the load tables. For anything beyond preliminary sizing, consult Walltopia.
